segments.step_name: Unbox package
segments.step_description: Unbox the test materials from the covid test box onto a table

segments.step_name: Unfold the instruction paper
segments.step_description: Open up the covid test instruction sheet

segments.step_name: Read the instructions
segments.step_description: Read the covid test instruction sheet

segments.step_name: fold the instruction paper
segments.step_description: Put away the covid test instruction sheet on the table

segments.step_name: carefully open the test tube seal paper
segments.step_description: Remove the test tube seal from the test tube

segments.step_name: Position the covid 19 test tube on the box
segments.step_description: Place the test tube in an erect position on the covid test box, but do not seat it fully

segments.step_name: Position the covid 19 test tube on the box
segments.step_description: Move the test tube onto the covid test box and set it upright (erect) as intended

segments.step_name: Locate and unwrap the collection swab
segments.step_description: Remove the nasal swab from its package

segments.step_name: Slowly insert the tip of the swab into the nose
segments.step_description: Insert the tip of the nasal swab into the left nostril

segments.step_name: Rotate and swirl the swab around for 5-10 times
segments.step_description: Rotate the nasal swab inside the left nostril

segments.step_name: Slowly extract the swab from the nostril
segments.step_description: Remove the nasal swab from the left nostril

segments.step_name: Repeat the process with the other nostril
segments.step_description: Collect sample from the right nostril with the nasal swab

segments.step_name: Dip the swab into the testing tube
segments.step_description: Insert the nasal swab into the test tube

segments.step_name: Rotate and swirl the swab around for 5-10 times
segments.step_description: Rotate the nasal swab in the test tube

segments.step_name: Remove the swab from the testing tube
segments.step_description: Remove the nasal swab from the test tube

segments.step_name: Position the covid 19 test tube on the box
segments.step_description: Place the test tube in an erect position on the covid test box

segments.step_name: Dispose waste
segments.step_description: Dispose used covid test materials and packages into the ziplock waste bag

segments.step_name: cover the test tube
segments.step_description: Cover the test tube with its cap

segments.step_name: Locate and unwrap the test plate
segments.step_description: Remove the covid test plate from its package

segments.step_name: Apply a few drops of the testing solution to the testing plate
segments.step_description: Apply drops of testing solution inside the test tube onto the covid test plate

segments.step_name: Dispose waste
segments.step_description: Dispose the test tube and covid test plate in the ziplock waste bag

segments.step_name: Dispose waste
segments.step_description: Put away the used covid test items and the ziplock waste bag into the covid test box
